conditional_docs.trigger: map fallback routing to a portable selector layer

paper.title: SATzilla2012: Improved Algorithm Selection Based on Cost-sensitive Classification Models
paper.venue: SAT Challenge 2012: Solver and Benchmark Descriptions

method_evidence.core_selector: one cost-sensitive 99-tree decision forest per algorithm pair; pairwise vote chooses final algorithm
method_evidence.sample_weight: absolute performance-score difference for the pair
additional_pipeline: second-highest-vote then backup on execution failure
method_evidence.paper_evaluation_limits: the two-page solver description gives data counts and default component-solver seed but no complete result or ablation table

project_mapping.current_implementation: PairwiseCostSensitiveSelector already matches the raw weighting, 99-tree, pairwise-vote core
project_mapping.current_result: raw cost weighting is development-only do_not_promote; it must not be rerun or activated under a renamed hypothesis
project_mapping.new_hypothesis: a separately preregistered abstain-to-fixed-backup layer may reduce worst-environment regret without accessing confirmation
project_mapping.candidate_contract: use only fold-visible confidence/margin and a fold-fixed backup; report trigger rate, realized improvement, regret, worst environment, and usage distribution
